ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file captured by the drone */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the drone at the time of capture */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the drone at the time of capture */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the drone at the time of capture */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle of the drone at the time of capture */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll angle of the drone at the time of capture */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw angle of the drone at the time of capture */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the dataset belongs */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was captured */,
  "capture_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was captured */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., drone, satellite) */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "drone_model" TEXT /* Model of the drone */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drone */,
  "max_flight_time" REAL /* Maximum flight time of the drone in minutes */,
  "drone_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the drone */,
  "drone_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the drone */,
  "drone_battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity of the drone in mAh */,
  "drone_camera_model" TEXT /* Model of the camera used by the drone */,
  "drone_camera_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the camera */,
  "drone_last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the drone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone used for the flight */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the flight */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the flight */,
  "data_collected" INTEGER /* Indicates if data was successfully collected during the flight */,
  "flight_duration" REAL /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "flight_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered during the flight */,
  "flight_path" TEXT /* Flight path as a series of GPS coordinates */,
  "flight_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight */,
  "flight_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, operator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Content of the annotation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., text, tag) */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "annotation_location" TEXT /* Location within the image where the annotation is placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_annotations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Agriculture, Forestry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "category_icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the category */,
  "category_color" TEXT /* Color code for the category for visual distinction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight associated with the log */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset collected during the flight */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone used for the flight */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the flight */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., start, end, data collection) */,
  "log_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)
